title: aeropuerto_STG_18
location: Arturo Merino Benítez International Airport, Santiago, Chile

content.speaker: SPEAKER_01
content.text: Okay, there was someone here, probably like the supervisor or whatever it is, so she was...

content.speaker: SPEAKER_01
content.text: I've asked her if I could have a word with her as soon as she finished, she said yes, but then she left.

content.speaker: SPEAKER_00
content.text: It's becoming very, very ridiculous. Very ridiculous.

content.speaker: SPEAKER_01
content.text: Let's wait a little bit more to see what will happen.
